parameters.text:
={
  "model": "mistral",
  "prompt": "You are a healthcare triage AI system.

You MUST classify the patient's symptoms using rule-based reasoning.

URGENCY RULES:
1. If chest pain AND fever -> High
2. If severe pain OR breathing difficulty -> High
3. If mild fever AND cough -> Medium
4. If headache only -> Low
5. If fever for more than 1 day -> Medium
6. If symptoms are minor and not severe -> Low

CATEGORY RULES:
The category MUST be exactly one of these values only:
General, Routine, Follow-up, Acute Care, Emergency, Cardiology, ENT, Dermatology, Pediatrics, Orthopedics, Gastroenterology, Psychiatry, Neurology

Category selection guide:
- Chest pain, breathing difficulty, severe pain -> Emergency
- Fever, cough, flu-like symptoms -> Acute Care
- Headache only or minor symptoms -> Routine
- Follow-up visit or ongoing mild symptoms -> Follow-up
- Heart/chest related symptoms -> Cardiology
- Ear, nose, throat symptoms -> ENT
- Skin/rash symptoms -> Dermatology
- Child patient symptoms -> Pediatrics
- Bone/joint/muscle injury -> Orthopedics
- Stomach/digestive symptoms -> Gastroenterology
- Anxiety, stress, mental health symptoms -> Psychiatry
- Numbness, seizure, migraine, nerve symptoms -> Neurology
- If unsure -> General

OUTPUT FORMAT STRICT JSON ONLY:
{
  "urgency": "Low | Medium | High",
  "category": "",
  "reasoning": "",
  "rule_triggered": "",
  "recommendation": ""
}

Patient message:
{{ $json.body.message }}

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No extra text.",
  "stream": false
}

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM doctors
WHERE is_available = true
AND (
  category = '{{ $json.body.category }}'
  OR specialization = '{{ $json.body.category }}'
  OR category = 'General'
  OR specialization = 'General Medicine'
)
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN category = '{{ $json.body.category }}' THEN 1
    WHEN specialization = '{{ $json.body.category }}' THEN 2
    WHEN specialization = 'General Medicine' THEN 3
    WHEN category = 'General' THEN 4
    ELSE 5
  END
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  patient_symptoms,
  urgency,
  category,
  doctor_id,
  appointment_date,
  appointment_time,
  patient_email,
  patient_phone,
  status,
  created_at
FROM appointments
WHERE patient_email = '{{ $("History Webhook").first().json.body.patient_email }}'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

parameters.responseBody:
={

  "rule_triggered": "={{$('Code in JavaScript').first().json.rule_triggered}}",
  "recommendation": "={{$('Code in JavaScript').first().json.recommendation || ''}}"
}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  a.id,
  a.patient_symptoms,
  a.urgency,
  a.category,
  a.appointment_date,
  a.appointment_time,
  a.patient_email,
  a.patient_phone,
  a.status,
  a.created_at,
  d.name AS doctor_name,
  d.email AS doctor_email
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.id
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;

SELECT
  id,
  name,
  email,
  phone,
  specialization,
  category,
  is_available,
  created_at
FROM doctors
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doctors) AS total_doctors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointments WHERE appointment_date = CURRENT_DATE) AS today_appointments,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM triage_results) AS completed_triage_cases,
  1 AS pending_payments;

SELECT appointment_time
FROM appointments
WHERE appointment_date = '{{ $json.body.appointment_date }}'
AND status IN ('Booked', 'Confirmed', 'Pending');

SELECT
  a.id,
  a.patient_symptoms,
  a.urgency,
  a.category,
  a.appointment_date,
  a.appointment_time,
  a.patient_email,
  a.patient_phone,
  a.status,
  a.created_at,
  d.name AS doctor_name,
  d.email AS doctor_email,
  d.specialization AS doctor_specialization
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.id
WHERE LOWER(TRIM(a.patient_email)) = LOWER(TRIM('{{ $json.body.patient_email || $json.body.email }}'))
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;

INSERT INTO patient_telegram (
  patient_email,
  telegram_chat_id,
  telegram_username,
  is_active,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.patient_email }}',
  '{{ $json.telegram_chat_id }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.telegram_username || "" }}', ''),
  true,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
ON CONFLICT (patient_email)
DO UPDATE SET
  telegram_chat_id = EXCLUDED.telegram_chat_id,
  telegram_username = EXCLUDED.telegram_username,
  is_active = true,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  a.id,
  a.patient_email,
  a.appointment_date,
  a.appointment_time,
  a.status,
  d.name AS doctor_name,
  pt.telegram_chat_id
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN doctors d
  ON a.doctor_id = d.id
INNER JOIN patient_telegram pt
  ON LOWER(TRIM(a.patient_email)) = LOWER(TRIM(pt.patient_email))
WHERE a.appointment_date = CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND a.status IN ('Confirmed', 'Booked', 'Pending')
  AND pt.is_active = true
  AND COALESCE(a.reminder_sent, false) = false;

SELECT
  patient_email,
  telegram_chat_id,
  telegram_username,
  is_active,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM patient_telegram
WHERE LOWER(TRIM(patient_email)) =
      LOWER(TRIM('{{ $json.body.patient_email }}'))
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE patient_telegram
SET
  is_active = false,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE LOWER(TRIM(patient_email)) =
      LOWER(TRIM('{{ $json.body.patient_email }}'))
RETURNING
  patient_email,
  telegram_chat_id,
  telegram_username,
  is_active;
